name: Naturia Landoise
name_jp: ナチュル・ランドオルス
desc:
1 EARTH Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner EARTH monsters
When a monster effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Spell from your hand to the GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that monster. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.
mnst_eff:
1 EARTH Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner EARTH monsters
When a monster effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Spell from your hand to the GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that monster. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.
eff:
1 EARTH Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner EARTH monsters
When a monster effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Spell from your hand to the GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that monster. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Requires Attribute specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
